chatbot.subtitle: Virtual Assistant
chatbot.replyHi: Hi there! How can I help you with booking, promotions, or cinema info?
chatbot.replyHelp:
I can help you with:
- Movie ticket booking 🎬
- Promotions & offers 🎁
- Cinema information 🏢
- Account support 👤
What would you like to know?
chatbot.replyTicket: To book tickets, go to the homepage, choose a movie, cinema and showtime! 🎫
chatbot.replyMovie: You can see the list of now showing and coming soon movies on the homepage! 🍿
chatbot.replyPrice: Ticket prices vary by cinema, showtime and seat type. You can see details when booking.
chatbot.replyThanks: Happy to help! Feel free to ask if you need anything else 😊
chatbot.replyDefault: Thank you for contacting us! Our support team will respond shortly. You can call our hotline 1800-123-456 for faster assistance.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers, get support, and explore our cinema guides
help.noResults: No results found. Try a different search term.
help.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our support team is here 24/7 to assist you.
help.faq1Q: How do I book a movie ticket?
help.faq1A: Simply go to our Home page, select a movie, choose your preferred cinema and showtime, then select your seats and proceed to payment. You can also book directly from the Movie detail page.
help.faq2Q: Can I modify or cancel my booking?
help.faq2A: Yes, you can modify or cancel your booking up to 2 hours before the showtime. Go to your Account → Booking History, find the booking and select Modify or Cancel. Please note that some fees may apply depending on the fare type.
help.faq3A: We accept major credit/debit cards (Visa, MasterCard), bank transfers, digital wallets (Google Pay, Apple Pay), and reward points. All payments are processed securely through our encrypted payment gateway.
help.faq4Q: How do I create an account?
help.faq4A: Click on 'Sign In' in the top navigation bar, then select 'Register'. Fill in your details including name, email, and phone number. You can also sign up quickly using your Google account.
help.faq5Q: How can I reset my password?
help.faq5A: On the login page, click 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and we will send you a password reset link. The link expires in 24 hours for security reasons.
help.faq6A: Refunds are processed to your original payment method within 5-7 business days. Cancellation fees may apply. For bookings made with reward points, points will be returned to your account.
help.faq7Q: Why is the website not loading properly?
help.faq7A: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, or try using a different browser. Ensure your internet connection is stable. If the problem persists, contact our support team.
help.faq8A: Go to your Account Settings and enable push notifications. You can choose to receive alerts for upcoming bookings, special offers, and new movie releases. Make sure your browser allows notifications for this site.

privacyPolicy.title: Regulations & Policies
privacyPolicy.subtitle: Cinema Pro - Online Movie Ticket Booking System
privacyPolicy.s1p1: Welcome to cinemapro.vn, owned and operated by Cinema Pro Entertainment Joint Stock Company at 123 Nguyen Hue, Ben Nghe Ward, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City.
privacyPolicy.s1p2: When accessing cinemapro.vn, you must be of legal age. If you are a minor, please only access the website with the consent of a legal guardian.
privacyPolicy.s1p3: By accessing, using, or interacting with the website, you accept all contents of these General Regulations and Cinema Pro's continuously updated policies. If you do not agree, please do not use the website.
privacyPolicy.s1s1Body: When accessing the website, you agree to assume all risks. Cinema Pro shall not be liable for any damages arising directly or indirectly from accessing the website or downloading data to personal devices.
privacyPolicy.s1s2Body: You are responsible for providing accurate information when registering an account. Cinema Pro is not responsible if you provide false information whether unintentionally or intentionally.
privacyPolicy.s1s3Body: All information posted on the website is provided truthfully, however Cinema Pro does not guarantee absolute accuracy. Cinema Pro reserves the right to change, edit, and remove information at any time.
privacyPolicy.s1s4Body: All content, images, software, and data on the website are copyrighted by Cinema Pro. You may not use the content for commercial purposes without prior written consent.
privacyPolicy.s1s5Body: All disputes will be prioritized for resolution through negotiation. If not resolved, disputes will be brought to the competent court in Ho Chi Minh City.
privacyPolicy.s2s1Body: Transaction Terms apply to all online transaction functions at cinemapro.vn, including movie ticket booking, food and beverage purchases, and other services.
privacyPolicy.s2s2Body: To use the service, you must register an account with verified information. You are responsible for maintaining account and password security. Cinema Pro reserves the right to refuse service if violations are detected.
privacyPolicy.s2s3Body: Cinema Pro opens online ticket sales prior to the show date, depending on each movie and theater schedule. The booking function closes 30 minutes before showtime or when the screening is sold out. You can book a maximum of 10 tickets per transaction.
privacyPolicy.s2s4Body: You must review all information before payment. Payment methods include: domestic cards, international cards, and e-wallets. By clicking "Pay", you confirm that you have checked and have no complaints about the service information.
privacyPolicy.s2s5Body: After successful payment, you will receive an email and/or SMS confirming your booking code. The transaction is only valid from the time you receive confirmation from Cinema Pro.
privacyPolicy.s2s6Body: Cinema Pro does not support cancellation/refund after successful payment, except in cases of system errors resulting in charges without booking confirmation. Refund time is 7-45 business days depending on the card type.
privacyPolicy.s2s7Body: For any questions or complaints, please contact our Customer Care Department:
privacyPolicy.s3s1Lead: Cinema Pro reserves the right to refuse service to customers who:
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet1: Illegally film, photograph, record audio, or broadcast movies in the theater;
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet2: Cause disturbances or obstruct other customers;
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet3: Use tobacco, e-cigarettes, or stimulants in the theater;
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet4: Bring weapons, flammable materials, or toxic substances;
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet6: Bring outside food or drinks without permission;
privacyPolicy.s3s1Bullet7: Intentionally enter restricted or prohibited areas.
privacyPolicy.s3s3Bullet1: Vietnamese film screenings are prioritized from 18:00 - 22:00;
privacyPolicy.s3s3Bullet2: Screenings for customers under 13 end before 22:00;
privacyPolicy.s3s3Bullet3: Screenings for customers under 16 end before 23:00.
privacyPolicy.s3s4Bullet1: Senior citizens, war veterans, disadvantaged individuals: minimum 20% discount;
privacyPolicy.s3s4Bullet3: Specially severely disabled persons: free tickets.
privacyPolicy.s3s4Bullet4: Applicable for direct purchases at the counter with valid identification.
privacyPolicy.s4Intro: Cinema Pro is committed to protecting your personal data. We will use the data you provide carefully, reasonably, and in accordance with Vietnamese law.
privacyPolicy.s4s1Bullet1: Full name, date of birth, gender;
privacyPolicy.s4s1Bullet5: Device information, cookies (when accessing the website).
privacyPolicy.s4s2Bullet1: Providing booking services and account management;
privacyPolicy.s4s2Bullet3: Sending promotional information and offers (with consent);
privacyPolicy.s4s3Body: Cinema Pro commits not to sell, transfer, or exchange customer personal information to third parties without consent, except as required by law. We apply appropriate security measures to prevent unauthorized access.
privacyPolicy.s4s4Bullet1: Right to know about data processing activities;
privacyPolicy.s4s4Bullet2: Right to consent or refuse data processing;
privacyPolicy.s4s4Bullet3: Right to access and edit personal data;
privacyPolicy.s4s4Bullet6: Right to complain under legal regulations.
privacyPolicy.s4s5Body: The website uses cookies to enhance user experience. You can adjust cookie settings in your browser. Continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of cookies.
privacyPolicy.s4s6Body: For any questions about the privacy policy, please contact:
privacyPolicy.contactAddress: Address: 123 Nguyen Hue, Ben Nghe Ward, District 1, HCMC

termsOfService.title: Terms of Service
termsOfService.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using Cinema Pro services. By using our platform, you agree to these terms.
termsOfService.eligibilityBody: You must be at least 13 years old to use our services. Users under 18 require parental consent.
termsOfService.accountsBody: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.
termsOfService.ticketsBody: All ticket purchases are subject to availability. Tickets are non-refundable except as outlined in our cancellation policy.
termsOfService.conductBody: You agree to use our platform lawfully and respectfully. Harassment, fraud, or disruptive behavior will result in account suspension.
termsOfService.intellectualBody: All content on our platform, including logos, images, and text, is owned by Cinema Pro and protected by copyright laws.
termsOfService.terminationBody: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or engage in fraudulent activity.
termsOfService.limitationBody: Cinema Pro is not liable for indirect damages arising from the use of our services, including but not limited to missed screenings.
termsOfService.governingBody: These terms are governed by the laws of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam.
termsOfService.contactBody: For questions about these terms, email legal@cinemapro.com.

aboutUs.title: About Cinema Pro
aboutUs.subtitle: Redefining the cinematic experience
aboutUs.desc1: Cinema Pro was founded with a simple mission: to transform the way people experience movies. We believe cinema is not just entertainment — it is art, emotion, and connection.
aboutUs.desc2: With state-of-the-art projection systems, premium luxury seating, and curated gourmet refreshments, every visit to Cinema Pro is designed to be unforgettable.
aboutUs.missionBody: To deliver world-class cinematic experiences that inspire, entertain, and connect communities.
aboutUs.visionBody: To be the most beloved cinema chain in Vietnam, setting the standard for premium movie-going experiences.
aboutUs.valuesBody: Passion for cinema, excellence in service, innovation in technology, and commitment to our community.

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join the Cinema Pro family
careers.desc: We are always looking for passionate individuals who love cinema and want to create extraordinary experiences for our guests.
careers.positionsBody: Check our current openings or send your resume to careers@cinemapro.com
careers.whyWorkBody: Competitive salary, medical benefits, free movie tickets, career growth opportunities, and a dynamic, creative work environment.
careers.applyBody: Send your resume and cover letter to careers@cinemapro.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
careers.backendDesc: Build and maintain high-performance backend services for our cinema platform. Design REST APIs, optimize database queries, and ensure system reliability at scale.
careers.marketingDesc: Lead our marketing strategy to drive brand awareness and ticket sales. Manage campaigns across digital channels, social media, and partnership programs.
careers.frontendDesc: Create intuitive and responsive user interfaces for our web platform. Work with modern React ecosystem to deliver premium cinema booking experiences.
careers.hrDesc: Shape our company culture and manage end-to-end recruitment. Build programs that attract, retain, and develop top talent in the cinema industry.
careers.dataDesc: Analyze customer behavior and box office data to drive business decisions. Build dashboards, generate insights, and support data-driven strategies.
careers.designDesc: Design beautiful, user-friendly interfaces for our cinema platform. Create wireframes, prototypes, and visual designs that delight our customers.
careers.successBody: Thank you for applying! We will review your application and get back to you within 5-7 business days.
careers.backendReqs:
• 3+ years experience with Java and Spring Boot
• Strong knowledge of PostgreSQL and database optimization
• Experience with Redis, RabbitMQ or similar
• Understanding of RESTful API design principles
• Familiarity with Docker, CI/CD pipelines
• Good English communication skills
careers.backendBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 50M VND/month
• 13th month salary & performance bonus
• Health insurance package
• Free movie tickets for you and family
• Flexible working hours
• Annual company trips and team building
careers.marketingReqs:
• 5+ years experience in marketing, preferably entertainment
• Proven track record in digital marketing campaigns
• Strong social media management skills
• Experience with SEO/SEM and analytics tools
• Excellent communication and presentation skills
• Creative thinking with data-driven mindset
careers.marketingBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 40M VND/month
• Marketing budget ownership
• Health insurance & annual health check
• Free movie tickets
• International conference opportunities
• Creative work environment
careers.frontendReqs:
• 2+ years experience with React ecosystem
• Strong TypeScript skills
• Experience with modern CSS (Tailwind, CSS Modules)
• Knowledge of responsive design principles
• Familiarity with Next.js is a plus
• Eye for UI/UX details
careers.frontendBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 45M VND/month
• Latest MacBook Pro provided
• Health insurance package
• Free movie tickets
• Conference & training budget
• Remote-friendly culture
careers.hrReqs:
• 4+ years experience in HR, preferably in tech/entertainment
• Deep understanding of Vietnamese labor law
• Experience building company culture programs
• Strong recruitment and talent management skills
• Excellent interpersonal skills
• English proficiency is a plus
careers.hrBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 35M VND/month
• Health insurance
• Free movie tickets
• Professional development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Supportive team environment
careers.dataReqs:
• 2+ years experience in data analysis
• Strong SQL skills
• Experience with Python for data processing
• Knowledge of Power BI or similar BI tools
• Understanding of ETL processes
• Business acumen and presentation skills
careers.dataBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 30M VND/month
• Health insurance
• Free movie tickets
• Access to online learning platforms
• Data conference attendance
• Career growth opportunities
careers.designReqs:
• 3+ years experience in UI/UX design
• Proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite
• Strong portfolio demonstrating web/mobile design
• Understanding of design systems
• User research and testing experience
• Animation skills are a plus
careers.designBenefits:
• Competitive salary up to 35M VND/month
• Latest design tools provided
• Health insurance
• Free movie tickets
• Creative freedom and ownership
• Design conference budget
careers.noJobs: No open positions in this department at the moment.

cookiePolicy.title: Cookie Policy
cookiePolicy.intro: When you visit our websites or use our applications, we may automatically collect personal data from you using cookies or similar technologies.
cookiePolicy.whatAreBody: Cookies are small text files that can be placed on your device that allow us to recognize and remember you.
cookiePolicy.howUseBody: We collect and use cookie data to improve your experience on our website and applications, including keeping you logged in, understanding how you use our site, showing you relevant content, displaying products and services tailored to you, and working with partners to provide relevant advertising.
cookiePolicy.typesBody: IP address, browser and device information, session duration, content reading time, interactions such as comments and reactions, article sharing data, and search keywords.
cookiePolicy.manageBody: Cookies are stored by default for your session. You have the right to manage cookies to block, delete, or disable these technologies in your browser or device settings.
cookiePolicy.contactBody: For any questions about our cookie policy, please contact us at support@cinemapro.com.
cookiePolicy.useItem2: Understand how you use our website/application
cookiePolicy.useItem4: Show products and services tailored to you
cookiePolicy.useItem5: Work with partners to provide relevant advertising
cookiePolicy.collectItem1: IP address, browser, device, session duration
cookiePolicy.collectItem3: Interactions such as comments, reactions, content suggestions

staffPortal.trackWork: Track working hours, estimated pay, and registered shifts.

staffPortal.noUpcomingShift: No approved upcoming shifts. Go to Schedule tab to register for new shifts.

safetyRules.title: Safety Rules
safetyRules.subtitle: Your safety is our priority
safetyRules.intro: Cinema Pro is committed to providing a safe and enjoyable environment for all guests and staff.
safetyRules.generalBody: Follow all staff instructions. Keep aisles clear. No running or disruptive behavior. Report any concerns to cinema staff immediately.
safetyRules.fireBody: Familiarize yourself with exit locations. In case of fire, remain calm and follow staff instructions to the nearest exit. Do not use elevators.
safetyRules.healthBody: Please maintain personal hygiene. Hand sanitizer stations are available throughout the cinema. If you feel unwell, please inform our staff.
safetyRules.securityBody: CCTV is in operation for your safety. Bags may be subject to inspection. Suspicious behavior should be reported to management.
safetyRules.childrenBody: Children under 12 must be accompanied by an adult. Please ensure children remain seated during screenings.

legal.title: Legal Information
legal.subtitle: Transparency and compliance
legal.desc: Welcome to the Cinema Pro Legal Information page. Here you will find important documents regarding your rights and our responsibilities.
legal.privacyBody: See how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
legal.termsBody: Read the terms governing your use of Cinema Pro services.
legal.cookiesBody: Learn about how we use cookies and tracking technologies.
legal.safetyBody: Review our safety guidelines for a secure cinema experience.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.subtitle: We are here to help
contactUs.desc: Have a question, comment, or concern? We would love to hear from you. Our team is available 24/7 to assist you.
contactUs.addressBody: 123 Cinema Boulevard, District 1, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
